title: Tangerines
description: Adds tangerines to the game which can be obtained by using the command /give @s swordmod:mandarin
body:
just a Minecraft mod created for twitch streamer Oxtwood (by the way, this is my first mod for Minecraft).

This mod will add to the game a new hearty food, tangerines, which, when eaten, restore a lot of satiety and give a lot of saturation; also, when eating tangerines, the level 7 haste effect will be applied for 5 seconds (for now, tangerines can only be obtained with the command /give @s swordmod: mandarin but I’m thinking of adding possibility of obtaining them in the update)
